title: PM Approval Drillthrough Return Coverage
objective: Add focused test-only proof that PM approval task-review and workpackage-review drillthrough to schedule, drivers, and variance preserve the expected return links and route query context, without changing product code, backend endpoints, schema, auth, ingress, or mutation behavior.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.

Read-only scout 019e2ca1-7322-7513-ad89-4dcc1ff12d22 confirmed the smallest next slice is test-only route-return coverage for schedule, drivers, and variance from task and workpackage approval review contexts.
Coordinator execution kept write ownership local to the focused approval-context smoke and governance surfaces while using the scout as the parallel orchestration lane.
constrained_outputs: Shared task-review and workpackage-review fixture helpers reduce duplicated approval-context test setup.
A route-return assertion helper reopens the approval context, clicks a drillthrough button, checks the destination URL, optionally checks projectId, and verifies the return link href.
Task-review smoke now proves Open Schedule, Open Drivers, and Open Variance preserve return links to PM task review.
Workpackage-review smoke now proves Open Schedule, Open Drivers, and Open Variance preserve return links to PM work package review.
Existing scoped history, compact history context, tracer, schedule snapshot, and escalation proofs remain intact.
validation_steps: CI=1 corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.approval-context.smoke.spec.ts
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-018 is test-only and does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, product-code mutation, auth widening, ingress widening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, Vercel promotion, or Render deployment action.
